3165640.name: You Can't See Ghosts!
3165640.description:
The Story Behind The Game

Making games and game development has been my passion since childhood. But once I entered the industry, I found myself working on games that I truly couldn't be proud of.

You Can't See Ghosts! is my debut title and a love letter to all the games that inspired me to take this risky path of solo game development.

I poured everything I have into this game, and my greatest hope is that it will leave a long and lasting memory for everyone that plays it.

You Can't See Ghosts!

You Can't See Ghosts! is a unique puzzle game centered on spatial awareness and deductive reasoning. You play as an invisible ghost, navigating each level by using context clues like bumping into walls or stepping on glass in order to figure out your position as you climb this mysterious tower.

Features:

  • Gameplay: Play over 100 hand-crafted levels that reinvent the Sokoban genre, featuring a mix of unique mechanics and some cleverly reimagined genre staples. Designed to welcome both newcomers and challenge seasoned players alike.

  • Story: Experience a charming narrative as you help the two ghosts, Neb and Grace, ascend the tower, uncovering secrets about the tower, the ghosts, and the mysterious Curator.

  • Replay: After completing each level, relax and watch a full replay of every move you made.

  • History Tracker: Keep track of your every move with a built-in log that visualizes each sound cue, making it ideal for all players, including those with hearing challenges.

  • Markers: Too much to keep track of? Use the in-game marker tool to create and organize custom markers, perfect for tracking thoughts and planning moves.

  • Hints: Stuck on a level? Each level offers progressively helpful custom hints to guide you through.

Thank you for taking a chance, and for spending your precious time on a small game with a big heart. I hope you enjoy your time with it! - Donatas
